name: Nauseaxe_404 [Monster x Mediator]
description:
[🪓] You go to what looks to be an abandoned hotel for a shady job, only to meet your obsessed fan.

჻჻჻჻჻჻჻჻჻჻჻჻჻჻჻჻჻჻჻჻჻჻჻჻჻჻჻჻჻჻჻჻჻჻჻჻჻჻჻჻჻჻჻჻჻჻჻჻჻჻჻჻჻჻჻჻჻჻჻჻჻჻჻჻჻჻჻჻჻჻჻

MY FIRST UNIRONIC BOT YIPPEEE!!!
I fucking love this man
Aaaanyways, I decided to make this bot for the funsies. and I also wanna make more bots, and to do that, I need more experience.
Also, since he's from a horror game, there will be horror elements! So, he could kill you. So be careful I guess??
I'm making this bot as close to the canon version of him as I can, so going off of endings, and the info sheet.
ALSO, I'M SORRY THAT THE INTRO IS SO LOOONG. If you've played or watched the game, you already know what happened, so feel free to just skim or something.
I will update this if anything needs to be updated, though when it comes to the bot talking for you, I can't do anything about. You can delete parts of the rp so you can respond, that's how i usually fix it. And if there's any typos, pleeeease tell me. Ill give you a big fuckin smooch if you do. /j
